curation.synopsis: Uriel Ventris, raised to the Primaris ranks by Roboute Guilliman's gene-doctors during the Indomitus Crusade, leads a hand-picked Ultramarines kill-force called the Swords of Calth to the frontier world of Sycorax. Once an Ork warzone, Sycorax is now under furious Necron assault: tomb-stalkers have risen from beneath the dunes and the cities fall section by section. Uriel senses an old foe's hand at work behind the xenos onslaught — a tally unfinished, a debt to the Imperium come due. Trapped deep in a devastated city, the Swords must adapt as much to Uriel's new Primaris incarnation as to the Necron offensive. The novel closes one chapter of the Ventris saga (his pre-Primaris career) and opens another (Primaris-Captain Uriel under Indomitus command) — chronologically far later than the 2002–2010 first six-book arc.
